cloudformation.hooktypeconfig.CfnAbout: The `HookTypeConfig` resource specifies the configuration of a hook.

cloudformation.hooktypeconfig.Configurat.Description: Specifies the activated hook type configuration, in this AWS account and AWS Region.  You must specify either `TypeName` and `Configuration` or `TypeARN` and `Configuration`.
Specifies the activated hook type configuration, in this AWS account and AWS Region.  Defaults to `default` alias. Hook types currently support default configuration alias.

cloudformation.hooktypeconfig.TypeArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Number (ARN) for the hook to set `Configuration` for.  You must specify either `TypeName` and `Configuration` or `TypeARN` and `Configuration`.

cloudformation.hooktypeconfig.TypeName.Description: The unique name for your hook. Specifies a three-part namespace for your hook, with a recommended pattern of `Organization::Service::Hook`.  You must specify either `TypeName` and `Configuration` or `TypeARN` and `Configuration`.
